name: ux-audit
description: Systemic UX/UI audit for Next.js apps. ux-site-mapper maps the route structure (app/ + pages/ router, layouts, flows, link graph, optional Chrome screenshots) then hands off to ux-ui-auditor, which scores findings against a bundled 7-category principles reference (consistency, flow, entry points, control matrix, color usage, color coding, information structure) with High/Medium/Low/Info severity. Auto-triggers when relevant.
